_comment_r: Rank 16: sufficient capacity for style/format adaptation on 25K samples. Lower for smaller datasets, higher only if complex factual learning needed.
_comment_alpha: alpha=32, r=16 → scaling=2.0. Standard starting point: adapter updates weighted 2x relative to frozen base.
_comment_targets: All 7 linear layers: q/k/v/o for attention routing, gate/up/down for phrasing and format associations.
